instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `is_unsupervised_weights`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```
```r

```
```r
expect_snapshot(error = TRUE, is_unsupervised_weights(3))
```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: recipes v1.3.1.9000
Description: Preprocessing and Feature Engineering Steps for Modeling
Function: is_unsupervised_weights
Parameters: wts
Test patterns used: expect_snapshot, test_that
Expectations used: expect_false, expect_snapshot, expect_true

Function Code:
```r
is_unsupervised_weights <- function(wts) {
  if (!hardhat::is_case_weights(wts)) {
    cli::cli_abort("Must be be a {.code case_weights} variable.")
  }

  hardhat::is_frequency_weights(wts)
}
```
